createsolar.ponder.solar_panel.title: Solar Panel
createsolar.ponder.solar_panel.text_1: The Solar Panel converts sunlight into electric energy
createsolar.ponder.solar_panel.text_2: The energy output is determined by the current time of the day and weather conditions
createsolar.ponder.solar_panel.text_3: It stores a small buffer and pushes energy downward into compatible blocks such as cables or machines
createsolar.ponder.solar_panel.text_4: Adjacent panels share their buffer energy horizontally
createsolar.ponder.tag.solar.title: Solar Energy
